_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第002集(arc-01/002)。头钩=E01尾钩:医生要来=穿帮即死。小桃首登场,教第一句保命中文「听不懂」。尾钩:医生提前到了。连戏:女主仍穿昨夜红嫁衣(未眠未换),盖头已摘、黑长发散;小桃=深灰女佣装白领低马尾(canon)。人设:她懂一点中文(能抓'医生/到了'),内心思考=中文(inner+💭)。

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride still wearing the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery from the wedding night, veil removed, long black hair loose and slightly disheveled, pacing anxiously beside the carved wedding bed in the opulent mansion bedroom, soft morning light seeping through window lattice mixing with burnt-out red candles, one hand pressed to her chest, worried frightened expression, single face in frame. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Trời sáng rồi, bác sĩ sắp đến
cô dâu giả sắp bị lộ
Làm sao đây
Đến 'đau đầu' tôi cũng không biết nói

shots.content: A sweet young Chinese maid, round wholesome face with straight bangs and a low ponytail, wearing a plain dark-grey buttoned servant uniform with a clean white collar, stands speaking gently and reassuringly with warm earnest eyes; in the blurred foreground the bride is seen only from behind over her shoulder — wearing the SAME ornate RED traditional Chinese wedding dress with gold embroidery covering her shoulders and back, long loose black hair down her back, NO veil, NO bare shoulders, her face NOT visible. The maid is the only face in frame. Bright morning opulent mansion bedroom. Cinematic medium shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Phu nhân, đừng sợ
Em dạy phu nhân một câu
Hình như cô ấy… muốn giúp tôi

shots.content: Close-up of the sweet young Chinese maid with straight bangs and a low ponytail in her plain dark-grey servant uniform with white collar, completely ALONE in the frame teaching toward the camera, absolutely NO other person, NO foreground figure, NO listener visible — leaning slightly forward speaking slowly and clearly, mouth open mid-word enunciating each syllable, holding up THREE fingers of one hand with an encouraging earnest expression, bright morning light in a blurred opulent bedroom behind her, her face is the only face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.pinyin: tīng bù dǒng gēn wǒ niàn
captions.local: Tīng bù dǒng, đọc theo em

shots.content: Close-up of the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, veil removed, long black hair loose, sitting at the edge of the carved wedding bed practicing speaking — lips parted mid-word, brow furrowed in fierce concentration, hands clenched on her lap, soft morning light, single face in frame. Cinematic close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Tīng… bù dǒng
Đúng rồi, cứ nói vậy
Tīng bù dǒng, ba chữ này
có lẽ sẽ cứu mạng tôi
Suốt cả buổi sáng
cô luyện câu ấy cả trăm lần

shots.content: Tall ornate carved wooden double doors of a luxurious Chinese mansion bedroom, TIGHTLY CLOSED, seen straight-on from inside the dim room; warm hallway light leaks through the narrow gap under the closed doors, and in that strip of light the dark shadow of two feet is standing right outside the door, tense ominous thriller mood, absolutely no people visible inside the room. Cinematic landscape still.

captions.local: Bỗng ngoài cửa có tiếng bước chân

captions.pinyin: yī shēng tí qián dào le
captions.local: Bác sĩ đến sớm rồi

shots.content: Exactly ONE woman alone in frame — the stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery, long loose black hair — inside the SAME dim opulent Chinese mansion bedroom as the previous scenes: dark carved wooden walls and pillars, red silk bedding, warm candle-and-morning mixed light. She presses her back flat against a carved dark-wood pillar, clutching her red silk skirt with both white-knuckled hands, face turned toward the door with WIDE TERRIFIED eyes and lips parted in panicked shallow breathing; NO mirror, NO reflection, NO second person, her single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.local: Sao nhanh vậy
Tôi còn chưa chuẩn bị xong
Một câu tīng bù dǒng
liệu có qua mặt được bác sĩ
Theo dõi tập sau nhé
